channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week: Keira Tom, Dougherty Valley basketball
item.description: The junior guard scored a game-high 24 points and dished out four assists to lead Dougherty Valley past Monte Vista
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: For Dominican baseball hopefuls, age fraud cases and a curveball from Japan reflect a broken system
item.description: BANÍ, Dominican Republic (AP) — There was little sleep in the days leading up to Jan. 15. Dozens of teenage baseball players across the Dominican Republic lay in bed, unable to close their eyes.
item.dc:creator: DÁNICA COTO and MARTÍN ADAMES ALCÁNTARA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Champions League draw serves up a Madrid derby, Bayern vs. Leverkusen and Liverpool-PSG
item.description: NYON, Switzerland (AP) — A Madrid derby. A German classic. A rare meeting between Liverpool and Paris Saint-Germain. The Champions League got more heavyweight clashes when the draw for the round of 16 was made Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes on a 'revenge tour' after losing Super Bowl LIX, teammate says
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs defensive end Charles Omenihu says Patrick Mahomes will be "on a mission," or perhaps a "revenge tour," after losing Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fruita's Tatum Williams reached the peak of Colorado wrestling with passion and purpose
item.description: Tatum Williams is a champion: "It's a culmination of really what feels like a lifetime's worth of work"
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game changed a lyric in “O Canada” from “in all of us command” to “that only us command.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: ESPN and Major League Baseball will end their national television deal after 2025 season
item.description: ESPN's coverage of Major League Baseball games — at least in its current form — will conclude at the end of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ja Morant has no comment on report that says group targeting pro athletes burglarized his home
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Two-time NBA All-Star Ja Morant is not talking about a published report that says he is the Memphis player whose home was burglarized by the seven men from Chile charged in federal court with orchestrating break-ins at the homes of prominent athletes around the country.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anthony Davis out at least 2 more weeks, but Mavs say he's making good progress with groin injury
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis will be sidelined at least two more weeks with the groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut, while the Mavericks said Thursday their star forward is making good progress in his recovery.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American fans lightly boo 'O Canada' before 4 Nations Face-Off title game
item.description: American fans lightly booed the Canadian national anthem and roared out their own Thursday night before the championship game of the 4 Nations Face-Off, a matchup between the United States and Canada that has taken on collateral importance in the wake of cross-border political animosity.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NASCAR deals Daytona 500 pole winner massive fine for 2nd consecutive year
item.description: Joe Gibbs Racing was docked 100 driver/owner points and 10 playoff points. The spoiler base is a single-source part that cannot be modified and was discovered in NASCAR's inspection process.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Robot umpires are getting their first MLB test during spring training
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A computerized system that calls balls and strikes is being tested during Major League Baseball spring training exhibition games starting Thursday after four years of experiments in the minor leagues.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: RSL settles for scoreless draw in Champions Cup opener
item.description: SAN JOSE, Costa Rica (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake kicked off its 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a scoreless draw against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano in RSL's first Champions Cup game since 2016. "I thought it was a really hard fought game," said RSL head coach Pablo Mastroeni.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9

item.title: Mastroeni prepares Real Salt Lake for a physical battle in Costa Rica
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni anticipates a fierce contest as his team travels to Costa Rica for their first competitive match of 2025 — a CONCACAF Champions Cup Round One clash against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ausar scores 21 as Utes run past K-State, 74-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar had 21 points and Lawson Lovering posted a double-double to help Utah hold on for a 74-69 victory over Kansas State on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Cubs manager Craig Counsell goes 1-on-1 with GN Sports from spring training
item.description: MESA, Ariz. — All baseball seasons are a roller-coaster ride to some degree, but Craig Counsell's first season as manager of the Cubs was especially up and down.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: DAYTONA, Fla. (WGHP) — The field of 41 racers has officially been set for Sunday's Daytona 500. This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway in Daytona Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WGN 9
